task_completion.description: Agent opens or reads the designation criteria file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal command (e.g., cat, less), or script showing the contents of /home/ga/GIS_Data/designation_criteria.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent accesses the census tracts dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A GIS application (like QGIS), text editor, or terminal showing the loading or reading of /home/ga/GIS_Data/census_tracts.geojson.

task_completion.description: Agent applies the specific high-risk criteria to filter the dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A filter dialog in a GIS app, a command-line tool (like jq or ogr2ogr), or a script (e.g., Python) explicitly showing the conditions being applied: AQI > 75 AND pop_density > 3500 AND dist_hospital_km > 7.5.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identifies the 7 qualifying census tracts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An attribute table, terminal output, or script output showing exactly the qualifying tracts: CT-003, CT-007, CT-011, CT-014, CT-016, CT-018, and CT-020.

task_completion.description: Agent exports the filtered tracts to the specified output file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As'/'Export' dialog, or a terminal command/script writing the final output to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/high_risk_zones.geojson.

integrity.description: The agent actually filtered the data rather than manually typing the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the use of a tool (GIS software, Python, jq, etc.) applying the logic to the input file, not just a text editor where the agent manually typed the final GeoJSON.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the tract IDs without reading the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent's commands or scripts should dynamically evaluate the conditions against the dataset rather than containing a hardcoded list of the 7 qualifying tracts.

integrity.description: The output file was saved to the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/high_risk_zones.geojson must be visible in the export dialog, terminal command, or script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The designation criteria require AQI > 75, population density > 3500, and distance to hospital > 7.5 km. Exactly 7 tracts qualify: CT-003, CT-007, CT-011, CT-014, CT-016, CT-018, and CT-020. The final output must be saved to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/high_risk_zones.geojson.
